name: Chicken Tequilla
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the chicken breasts in the stock until tender.
2. Remove and cube the chicken. Set aside, reserving the stock.
3. Sauté the garlic in olive oil.
4. Add tomatoes (breaking them up) and the remaining ingredients. Simmer, covered, for 1/2 hour.
5. Add the cubed chicken and reheat.
6. Toss with cooked noodles.
7. If the sauce becomes too thick, add more chicken stock to achieve desired consistency.
8. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and garnish with fresh basil or parsley leaves.
